text_blocks.text_content: Welcome to Peking University! Original ads as the imperial university of Peking University in 1988. Peking University was China's first national comprehensive university and the People's Republic of China in 1949. It has developed into a comprehensive university with outstanding achievements in the humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences. The university has been a leading university in the People's Republic of China in 1978 and has ushered in a new era of international cooperation with foreign higher education in a new level in 20o0 and has gained the trust of all nations.

The University is the first of all national and all international and social sciences. Supported by the engineering department, the humanities department, and the social sciences, the university has made remarkable achievements, as well as such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents, winning major achievements, such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents, winning major achievements, such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents.
Peking University is a cadre of top-quality and creative students, a major resource of cutting-edge science and knowledge and a key bridge for international collaboration.

=====================

BASE:  torch.Size([1, 256, 1280])

PATCHES:  torch.Size([6, 100, 1280])

=====================

Welcome to Peking University! Original ads as the imperial university of Peking University in 1988. Peking University was China's first national comprehensive university and the People's Republic of China in 1949. It has developed into a comprehensive university with outstanding achievements in the humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences. The university has been a leading university in the People's Republic of China in 1978 and has ushered in a new era of international cooperation with foreign higher education in a new level in 20o0 and has gained the trust of all nations. 

The University is the first of all national and all international and social sciences. Supported by the engineering department, the humanities department, and the social sciences, the university has made remarkable achievements, as well as such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents, winning major achievements, such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents, winning major achievements, such as optimizing disciplines, cultivating talents. 

Peking University is a cadre of top-quality and creative students, a major resource of cutting-edge science and knowledge and a key bridge for international collaboration.
